folio.label: 87v
folio.l: And after that , a rosted pygges hede
But that I nolde for me , no beest were dede
Than had I witú ©ow , homly sufficeaunce
I am a man , of litel sustenaunce
My spirit hatú his fostrynge , in the bible
My body is ay so redy , & so penyble
To wake , that my stomak is destroyed
I preye ©ow dame , that ©e be nat a noyed
Thougú I so frendly , ©ow my counseil shewe
By god I nold han told it , but a fewe
¢ Now Sire q¶ she , but a word or I goo
My child is deed , with inne theise wekes twoo
Sone after that ©e went , out of this Toun~
¢ His detú saw I , by reuelaciou~
Seide this Frere , at hom in oure dortour
I dar wel seyn , that or half an houre
Aftir his deetú , I saw hi~ born~ to blisse
In myn auysione , so god me wysse
So dide oure Sexteyn , and oure Fermerer
That han ben trewe freres , fifty ©ere
They moun now , god bythanked of his lone

note.notetxt: 153There is a sign in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: Maken here Iubilee , and walken allone
And vp I roos , and al oure couent eke
Witú many a teer , trillynge on my cheke
Witú outen noyse , and clateryngö of belles
To deum , was oure songö / & nothyngö elles
Saue that to Crist , I bad an orisou~
Thankynge hi~ , of my reuelaciou~
For sire and dame , trostetú me rigút wele
Oure orisons ben more , effectuele
And more we sen , of Cristes secree thynges
Than borel folk , al thougú that they ben kynges
We lyue in pouert , and in abstinence
And borel folk , in rychesse and in despence
Of mete and drynk , and in here foule delyt
We han this worldlis list , al in despyt
Lazar and Dyues , lyueden dyuersly
And dyuers guerdoun , hadden ther by
Who so wol preye , he must fast and beclene
And fatte his soule , and make his body leene
We fare as seitú the Appostel , clotú and food
Suffisetú vs , thougú they be nat ful good
The clennesse and the fastynge , of vs Freres
Maketú that Crist , acceptetú oure preyeres
Loo Moyses , fourty dayes and fourty nygút
Fasted , er that god ful of mygút
